description: Curated seed playbooks for the Luna Self-Healing Playbook engine (Phase 5E). Recommendations only; no playbook executes a command. The engine matches a failure text/log/verifier-summary to playbooks by tag and detection-signal scoring. Operator approval is always required to act.

playbooks.title: worker.py fails to import
likely_causes: luna_hygiene export contract was reverted or weakened
a module rename broke a transitive import
stale __pycache__ holding an old module signature
an aider edit removed required top-level constants
safe_first_actions: Set memory/continues_update.stop to freeze CU before any edit
Run: python -c "import worker; print('IMPORT_OK')" and capture stderr verbatim
Inspect luna_modules/luna_hygiene.py against the export contract used by worker.py
Run py_compile on the failing file with --aider_venv python and capture stderr
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Running aider on worker.py blindly to 'fix it'
Mass-importing changes in luna_modules without a planned-change ledger row
Editing personality, identity, or goals files
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Restore the failing file from the most recent backups/<phase>/<file>.bak; never delete memory/logs/queues.

playbooks.title: py_compile reports a syntax error
likely_causes: an interrupted aider edit left a half-written diff on disk
a manual edit broke indentation
an encoding mismatch (BOM / UTF-8 mixed)
safe_first_actions: Read the exact stderr line and column from py_compile
Inspect that line in the file before editing
Restore the file from the most recent backups/<phase>/<file>.bak
Run py_compile again to confirm rc=0
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Broad refactors before fixing the exact error
Re-running aider on the same file without scoping
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: git checkout HEAD -- <target> if previously committed; otherwise restore from .bak.

playbooks.title: Guardian thrashing service restarts
likely_causes: two processes are racing to acquire the worker lock
stale lock file points to a dead PID and isn't aged out
Windows Python launcher parent/child pair miscounted as duplicates
safe_first_actions: Set memory/continues_update.stop or LUNA_STOP_NOW.flag to freeze the storm
Inspect logs/luna_worker.lock.json and memory/luna_guardian.lock.json
Use Test-InvokesScript-style logical-role classification (parent/child pair = 1 logical)
Quarantine stale locks to memory/disabled_flags/ instead of deleting
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: taskkill of all python processes system-wide
Deleting locks instead of quarantining
Disabling restart budgets in luna_guardian.py
verification_commands: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process by command line + parent/child
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Locks are append-only artifacts; never delete, only move to memory/disabled_flags/.

playbooks.title: Worker heartbeat is stale
likely_causes: worker is busy in a long blocking call (aider, ollama)
worker crashed silently
filesystem write failed on the heartbeat path
safe_first_actions: Confirm worker process exists via Get-CimInstance
Tail logs/luna_worker.log for the most recent unhandled exception
Check disk-free under D:\SurgeApp
Restart worker only if the process is genuinely gone (let guardian handle)
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Marking 'online' if heartbeat is stale just to silence the badge
Killing every python process to force a restart
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Never alter the heartbeat file directly; only the live worker should write it.

playbooks.title: Stale aider_jobs/active entries persist
detection_signals: aider_jobs/active has files older than 30 minutes
likely_causes: bridge crashed mid-job
kill switch was set during processing
aider child was orphaned
safe_first_actions: Run aider_bridge.py _quarantine_stale_active_jobs(stale_minutes=30)
Move (don't delete) old jobs to aider_jobs/quarantine/<id>.orphaned_active_<ts>.json
Confirm no python -m aider child still references the same logic_updates path
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Deleting active job files
Re-claiming a job whose target has a 24h NOOP cooldown
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Quarantine, don't delete. Reviewable copy lives under aider_jobs/quarantine/.

playbooks.title: Aider job timed out
detection_signals: RUN_AIDER_START followed by long silence then no RUN_AIDER_END
likely_causes: target file too large for the model context
Ollama under VRAM pressure or producing slowly
aider hung waiting on prompt-toolkit input
safe_first_actions: taskkill /T /F /PID <aider_pid> to kill the entire process tree
Mark target with a 24h NOOP/timeout cooldown
Quarantine the result with failure_reason=aider_timeout_process_tree_killed
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Leaving orphan python -m aider children alive
Retrying the same target without scoping or smaller context
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Cooldown the target; never delete bridge logs.

playbooks.title: Aider exceeded model context window
likely_causes: target file size > MAX_TARGET_FILE_BYTES (50 KB)
aider auto-pulled extra files into context
OLLAMA_NUM_CTX too low for the file
safe_first_actions: Reject targets above the size cap before invoking aider
Apply 24h cooldown for that target
Use function-scope edit (start_line/end_line) instead of whole-file
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Retrying the same oversized full-file job
Increasing num_ctx beyond what the GPU can hold
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Cooldown is the rollback; the original file is untouched in logic_updates/.

playbooks.title: continues_update fake-busy CU_START/CU_STOP loop
detection_signals: CU_START followed by CU_STOP within seconds
likely_causes: wrapper auto-unlinks the stop flag at end of loop
loop returns no structured reason so wrapper can't compute backoff
launcher gate races wrapper backoff and respawns
safe_first_actions: Set memory/continues_update.stop to freeze CU
Read continues_update_state.json for current pause_reason and ui_status
Confirm Phase 3 _cu_wrapper_run + _cu_wrapper_pause_after_result are present
Audit live feed for CU_PAUSED_* events instead of raw CU_START/STOP pairs
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Letting LaunchLuna respawn worker_cu while in churn
Removing the stop flag without inspecting cause
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Freeze first, inspect, then resume via memory/continues_update.resume_once after the cause is understood.

playbooks.title: CU paused because tracked core files are dirty
detection_signals: git status --porcelain --untracked-files=no shows tracked-modified core files
likely_causes: operator has uncommitted edits in core files
Luna's earlier autonomous edit hasn't been reviewed yet
safe_first_actions: Run git status --porcelain --untracked-files=no -- <core file list>
Review each dirty file's diff
Commit, revert, or ask operator before resuming
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Bypassing the dirty-core gate
Forcing CU to overwrite operator-uncommitted edits
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: git checkout -- <file> reverts; commit if the change is wanted.

playbooks.title: Status file lies about current state
detection_signals: bridge state=processing but last_event_at older than 5 minutes
ui_status=paused_dirty_core but tree is clean and pause_reason is empty
likely_causes: stale persisted dirty_targets carried across cycles
bridge heartbeat thread died
status writer lost its write lock
safe_first_actions: Cross-check status against luna_live_feed.jsonl tail
Inspect process state via Get-CimInstance for the claimed PID
Trigger a one-shot CU refresh via memory/continues_update.resume_once after freeze
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Reporting running_real_job without a fresh signal
Editing the verifier to hide the staleness
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Truth is the ground state; never lie. Update _cu_compute_ui_status if priority is wrong.

playbooks.title: Verifier flags parent/child Python launcher pair as duplicates
detection_signals: Luna_Post_Repair_Verify.ps1: 'duplicate storm' for worker_main with physical=2
Get-CimInstance shows one parent + one child process for same script
likely_causes: Windows Python launcher (pythonw.exe) spawns a child interpreter that shows the same script in command line
verifier counts physical PIDs without parent/child collapse
safe_first_actions: Use logical-role counting (parent/child pair = 1 logical)
Confirm via Test-InvokesScript regex (excludes -m aider) before flagging as duplicate
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Killing the child interpreter — it IS the running service
verification_commands: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Select ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CommandLine
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: No action; this is a classification fix, not a real duplicate.

playbooks.title: Ollama API not responding
likely_causes: ollama serve is not running
ollama process alive but port-stuck (rare)
VRAM exhausted and model unable to load
safe_first_actions: Test-Path ollama.exe
Probe http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags via Invoke-WebRequest
Let luna_guardian._recover_ollama handle the restart per cooldown
Check VRAM via /api/ps if a model is loaded
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Switching to a cloud API silently
Killing ollama mid-load (data loss risk)
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Local-only. Never silently swap to a cloud endpoint.

playbooks.title: UI claims running but no real work is progressing
detection_signals: terminal badge: ⠹ AIDER · ... but no aider_bridge.log entries for >5 min
ui_status=running_real_job but cycles counter not advancing
live feed silent for >120s while bridge state=processing
likely_causes: bridge heartbeat thread dead
model is stuck in slow generation but appears alive
live feed file rotated and reader lost track
safe_first_actions: Inspect logs/aider_bridge_status.json elapsed_seconds + last_event_at
Tail logs/luna_live_feed.jsonl
Check memory/continues_update_state.json cycles + last_cycle_at
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Trusting the UI badge without backing files
Force-killing services without checking the bridge heartbeat first
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Show truthful status (paused/blocked/idle/stalled) immediately; the operator decides next step.

playbooks.title: Runtime log/memory file is dirtying git or filling disk
detection_signals: git status repeatedly shows runtime telemetry as modified
likely_causes: telemetry file is tracked by git and appended every cycle
no log rotation policy in place
safe_first_actions: Add the runtime path to .gitignore
git rm --cached <path> (NOT delete from disk)
Plan a daily compaction job that summarizes into Phase 5D memory index
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Deleting or truncating memory/log files
Moving runtime telemetry out of memory/ or logs/
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Files are kept on disk; only the git index is updated.

playbooks.title: Unapproved package install proposal
detection_signals: diff or plan contains 'pip install', 'winget install', 'npm install', 'requirements.txt' addition
new top-level dependency without operator approval
likely_causes: an autonomous plan tried to bring in a new dependency
a repair playbook was misclassified as Tier-3 auto-apply
safe_first_actions: Block the install at the upgrade gate
Create a package proposal in memory/luna_package_proposals.json (not yet built)
Ask operator with rationale, version, and risk class
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Running the install before approval
Disabling the package allowlist
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: If installed by accident, pip uninstall and revert requirements.txt.

playbooks.title: Broad refactor or architecture replacement detected
detection_signals: diff > 200 lines across multiple core files
new top-level service or framework module
core file replaced rather than edited
personality, identity, or goals files modified
missing file on the curated module list with no replacement entry
likely_causes: an overzealous autonomous plan attempted a wide rewrite
operator-supplied prompt that asks for a redesign was applied automatically
safe_first_actions: Block at the upgrade gate (Phase 5F)
Require an operator-approved planned-change ledger row
Split the change into per-file commits with rollback paths
Restate Luna's current goal and confirm no drift before any apply
unsafe_actions_to_avoid: Replacing worker.py / aider_bridge.py / luna_guardian.py / LaunchLuna.pyw
Editing personality/identity/goals files without approval
Mass-rewriting luna_modules in one cycle
playbooks.rollback_or_safety_rule: Reject the plan. Revert from backups/<phase>/<file>.bak. Open a planning prompt instead.
